domain: Venus flytrap bistable 2-stimulus trap — three trichome trigger-hairs; first AP pre-loads; second AP within ~20-30s commits the bistable snap; single AP is false-trigger and never commits.
specific_mechanism: Two-stimulus integrate-and-fire over sliding time window; bistable mechanical commit only after temporal double-match.
llm_application: TRAP-COMMIT: two-stimulus pre-commit gate for expensive operations (chain-of-thought expansion, tool call, retrieval). First matching activation signal sets a latent flag (raises internal threshold); ONLY a second matching activation within sliding window of T tokens commits the operation. Single accidental matches never commit. Designed for strong false-positive rejection on expensive ops.
novelty_claim: Gated Attention (NeurIPS 2025) is single-step sigmoid gate. MoE routing fires on per-token best-k. Tool-call routing fires on single classifier match. Spec-decoding double-prediction is verification not commit-gating. TRAP-COMMIT's distinctive contribution is TEMPORAL DOUBLE-MATCH within a sliding window — biological 2-stimulus integrate-and-fire applied to expensive-op commit-gating.
